ogTitle: Kureen vs Kurrimine Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kureen and Kurrimine Beach.
heading: Kureen vs Kurrimine Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kureen, Queensland and Kurrimine Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kureen has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kurrimine Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kureen or Kurrimine Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kureen has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Kurrimine Beach scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kureen scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Kurrimine Beach scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kureen or Kurrimine Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kureen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
